calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-10-2005 Continued To Aug-15-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-15-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias CSR: Scott Hughes.
Michael S. Rossoff, Esq., for Plaintiff: Mercy Services Corporation.
Plaintiff's witness: Roberta Goldman, Property Manager, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Daniel Treadwell.
Exhibit 1 - Direct Access to Housing (DAH) Program-------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - 10 Day Notice to Cure or Quit -----------------------------------IND/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 144 Eddy Street, #412, San Francisco, CA 94102.
Back Rent and Damages of $416.76
Costs waived.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-15-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE: MICHAEL ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF MERCY SERVICES CORP.
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DANIEL TREADWELL

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.

JUDGE OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE, CLERKS RENE PASCUAL & BARBARA MORRIS NOT REPORTED 218.
